MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Civic Properties is present. Represented by Joe Vargo.
Attorney, Edward Singer, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Reymundo Chavez, is present.
Attorney, Matthew Tolve , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-09-2010 is vacated.
